title: FileDirRequest
description: FileDirRequest: Used to query Directories or Files.

Location.description: Directory and/or Files from this location will be queried.

SearchSubdirectories.description: If enabled, look also in subdirectories.

IncludeFileContents.description: Whether to include the contents of the Files.

MaxNesting.description:
If IncludeSubdirectories is true, this sets the maximum subdirectiory nesting level to look in.
Defaults to -1 which corresponds to no limit.

MaxFiles.description:
Sets the maximum number of Files to retrieve.
Defaults to -1 which corresponds to no limit.

MaxDirectories.description:
Sets the maximum number of Directories to retrieve.
Defaults to -1 which corresponds to no limit.

Exclusions.description: These files or directories will be excluded from the results. You can also specify string Full Paths.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
